spec.description: This is a modern 'Pods View' dashboard for your Kubernetes cluster(s). Made for kube-prometheus-stack and take advantage of the latest Grafana features. GitHub repository: https://github.com/dotdc/grafana-dashboards-kubernetes
Panel only works when a single pod is selected.
spec.title: Created by

spec.expr: sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", container!="", node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container, id)

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="memory", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"}) by (container)

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="memory", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"}) by (container)

spec.title: Memory Usage / Requests & Limits by container

spec.expr:
sum by (pod) (
rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod",
node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])
* on (namespace, pod) group_left()
max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{host_network="false"})
)

sum by (pod) (
rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod",
node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])
* on (namespace, pod) group_left()
max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{host_network="false"})
)

- sum by (pod) (
rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod",
node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])
* on (namespace, pod) group_left()
max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{host_network="false"})
)

spec.description: Panel only works when a single pod is selected.
spec.title: Running on

spec.expr:
sum by (pod) (
rate(container_network_receive_packets_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod",
node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])
* on (namespace, pod) group_left()
max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{host_network="false"})
)

- sum by (pod) (
rate(container_network_transmit_packets_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod",
node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])
* on (namespace, pod) group_left()
max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{host_network="false"})
)

sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"})

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="memory", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"})

spec.description: Panel only works when a single pod is selected.
spec.title: Pod IP

spec.expr: sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"})

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="memory", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"})

sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"}) by (container)

sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", node=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", node=~"$node"}) by (container)

spec.title: CPU Usage / Requests & Limits by container

spec.expr: sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace.*", pod=~"$pod", image!="", container!="", node=~"$node"}) by (container, id)
